signup.title: Sign up
signup.emailFirstHint: Please enter your email to continue. We’ll send you a link to proceed.
signup.check_your_email: We’ve sent you an email to continue your signup. It may take 1–2 minutes to arrive.

signout.title: Sign out
signout.success: You have been signed out successfully.

recovery.title: Recover account
recovery.hint: Enter your email, then choose what you want us to send.
recovery.check_your_email: If this email can be used for recovery, we sent the requested email.

error.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
